title: Identify critical path on table view
excerpt: Similar to how milestones can be identified on the table view, it would be great to see some indication if an item is on the critical path or not, without having to go to the Gantt chart.

posts.author: Usernamegame (Jake N)
posts.cookedHtml: Similar to how milestones can be identified on the table view, it would be great to see some indication if an item is on the critical path or not, without having to go to the Gantt chart.

posts.author: JustAnotherPM (Stuart Hooker)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree this would be really useful, in addition to the ability to filter the GANTT and table by the critical path value/flag. In larger boards the current functionality is cumbersome to use (unfortunately, I am out of voting credits). The functionality also needs to be enhanced; the current CP seems to pick-up all tasks on the path as opposed to those that will actually delay the overall timeline if they move.

posts.author: Usernamegame (Jake N)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks. Please vote for this idea and get others on our team to as well!
